name: Isla Table Lamp - 26.5 Inch Height - TBL4596 - Natural - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the captivating Isla 26.5 inch natural resin table lamp. Merging artistry with functionality, this lamp showcases a beautifully crafted resin body that imparts an earthy elegance to your decor. Its natural finish pairs seamlessly with a soft fabric shade, providing a gentle and inviting glow that enriches any room. Perfect for your living area, bedroom, or study, Isla brings a touch of sophistication and charm. Elevate your interior with this eye-catching piece that complements modern and traditional settings alike. Transform your home with Isla, where style meets subtle detailing, creating a welcoming ambiance for every occasion.
